en2_1_scenarios.name: Dataset card with splits and per-field confidence
en2_1_scenarios.description: ML dataset with file distributions, record schema, and per-field annotation quality metadata

en2_1_scenarios.name: NER annotations with per-token confidence
en2_1_scenarios.description: NLP token annotations with per-token confidence, source, method

en2_1_scenarios.name: IoT sensor reading with uncertainty and calibration
en2_1_scenarios.description: Sensor observation with measurement uncertainty, calibration provenance, confidence

en2_1_scenarios.name: KG triple with multi-source provenance chain
en2_1_scenarios.description: Knowledge graph assertion with confidence, multi-source derivation, human verification

en2_1_scenarios.name: Model prediction with multi-label confidence
en2_1_scenarios.description: Classification output with per-label confidence and model provenance

en2_1_scenarios.name: Multilingual content with translation provenance
en2_1_scenarios.description: Translated text with source language, model, confidence, and timestamp

en2_1_scenarios.name: Temporal validity window on regulatory assertion
en2_1_scenarios.description: Time-bounded assertion with validity period and confidence on status

en2_1_scenarios.name: Validation shape for Person entity
en2_1_scenarios.description: Data validation constraints: types, required fields, ranges, patterns

en2_1_scenarios.name: Multi-source fused assertion with SL opinion
en2_1_scenarios.description: Fused claim from 3 sources with full (b,d,u,a) opinion and fusion provenance

en2_1_scenarios.name: Invalidated/retracted claim
en2_1_scenarios.description: Retracted assertion with invalidation timestamp and reason

sl_opinion.justification: @opinion dict with b/d/u/a; Opinion class in confidence_algebra

rdf_compat.justification: JSON-LD is an RDF serialization; to_rdf_star_ntriples()

confidence.justification: No annotation-level metadata in Croissant spec (MLCommons 2024)

schema_validation.justification: cr:Field has dataType but limited constraints

dataset_metadata.justification: Core purpose: sc:Dataset with name, description, license

confidence.justification: No native confidence; use prov:value + additionalProperty hack

sl_opinion.justification: No opinion algebra; would need custom ontology extension

temporal_query.justification: SPARQL query over prov timestamps; no built-in API

cumulative_fusion.justification: No uncertainty algebra; PROV tracks provenance not uncertainty

averaging_fusion.justification: No uncertainty algebra; PROV tracks provenance not uncertainty

trust_discount.justification: No uncertainty algebra; PROV tracks provenance not uncertainty

temporal_decay.justification: No uncertainty algebra; PROV tracks provenance not uncertainty

rdf_compat.justification: PROV-O is an OWL ontology; fully RDF

ssn_sosa.justification: Can combine PROV + SSN but requires manual graph construction

measurement_uncertainty.justification: Via SSN extension, not native PROV

graph_merge.justification: RDF graph union, but no semantic merge logic

notes: EN2.1+EN2.2 Extended: 10 scenarios x 6 formats with information completeness scoring (semantic fields preserved), bytes-per-field normalization, compact+pretty serialization, scaling analysis ([10, 100, 1000, 10000]), and justified feature coverage matrix (36 features x 8 formats). Every coverage cell includes a justification string.
